sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n90607" key="prou+peroxh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προϋπεροχή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n90607.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">protuberance above</tr_> the eye, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg013:35" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">13.35</biblScope> </bibl> (pl.).</sense> </entryFree>
